name: Fourth of July Tart
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Light rum, kirsch; or cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, hull, and thoroughly dry strawberries.
2. Wash and dry blueberries.
3. Boil jelly, sugar, and liquor in a small saucepan until the last drops from a spoon are sticky.
4. Brush the interior of the pastry shell with a thin layer of the jelly mixture. Allow to set for 5 minutes.
5. Spread the rum cream filling into the shell.
6. Arrange strawberries and blueberries over the cream.
7. Brush the fruit with the jelly mixture.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
